jobs.name: techuni-daily-standup
jobs.description: TechUni AI daily stand-up — collect department status, log summary

payload.message: TechUni Daily Stand-Up: You are CEO of TechUni AI. Read /home/bbrelin/company/workflows/daily-standup.md for the procedure. Today: collect dept status via sessions_send, compile CEO summary, save to /home/bbrelin/company/memory/standup-[DATE].md. Alert Braun via Telegram only for P0 incidents or critical blockers.

jobs.name: techuni-weekly-report
jobs.description: TechUni AI weekly executive report to Braun — every Friday 16:00 Berlin

payload.message: TechUni Weekly Report: You are CEO of TechUni AI. Read /home/bbrelin/company/workflows/weekly-report.md. Compile this week's executive report from stand-up logs in /home/bbrelin/company/memory/, request summaries from departments via sessions_send, pull revenue data from course-creator DB, save to /home/bbrelin/company/memory/weekly-[DATE].md, then send formatted report to Braun via Telegram.

jobs.name: techuni-content-pipeline
jobs.description: TechUni AI weekly content pipeline — every Monday 09:00 Berlin

payload.message: TechUni Content Pipeline: You are CMO of TechUni AI. Read /home/bbrelin/company/workflows/content-pipeline.md and /home/bbrelin/company/agents/Marketing/SOUL.md. Research 5 trending AI/L&D topics via web_search, validate keyword opportunities, create this week's content calendar, and save it to /home/bbrelin/company/memory/content-calendar-[YYYY-WW].md. Draft the Monday LinkedIn post.
